An announcement from Cadence Minerals ( (GB:KDNC) ) is now available.

Cadence Minerals has announced that CEO Kiran Morzaria will host a live investor presentation on 15 January 2026 via the Investor Meet Company platform, focusing on the Amapá Iron Ore Project and its path to cash flow and development. The event is open to existing and prospective shareholders, who can register online and submit questions in advance or during the session, underscoring the company’s efforts to engage the market and provide greater transparency around the progress and strategic direction of its flagship iron ore asset.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:KDNC) stock is a Hold with a £3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cadence Minerals stock, see the GB:KDNC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:KDNC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:KDNC is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (multi-year losses, sharp revenue decline, and ongoing cash burn) and soft technical momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Low leverage is a partial offset, but the negative P/E and lack of dividend data provide limited valuation support.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:KDNC stock, click here.

More about Cadence Minerals

Cadence Minerals plc, listed on AIM under the ticker KDNC, is a mining investment and development company focused on mineral resource projects, notably the Amapá Iron Ore Project, where it aims to advance assets toward production and cash generation for shareholders.

data.title: Sinopec Tightens Board Governance With New Nomination Committee Charter
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from China Petroleum & Chemical ( (HK:0386) ) is now available.

China Petroleum & Chemical Corporation has formally adopted updated terms of reference for the nomination committee under its board of directors, aligning the committee’s composition and responsibilities with China’s Company Law, the national corporate governance code for listed companies, and the securities rules of the exchanges where it is listed. The new framework stipulates that independent directors must form a majority of the nomination committee, that its chair must be an independent director designated by the board, and that committee members are appointed through a defined nomination process and serve concurrent terms with their directorships, with mechanisms to fill vacancies and appoint consulting members, underscoring the company’s emphasis on strengthened board oversight and more regulated governance procedures.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0386) stock is a Sell with a HK$4.03 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Petroleum & Chemical stock, see the HK:0386 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Petroleum & Chemical

China Petroleum & Chemical Corporation, commonly known as Sinopec, is a major integrated energy and chemical company engaged in petroleum and petrochemical exploration, refining, production and related services. Its shares are listed in multiple markets and it operates under the corporate governance frameworks and securities regulatory rules applicable to listed companies in the PRC and the jurisdictions where its shares trade.

Average Trading Volume: 146,268,523

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$772.7B

See more insights into 0386 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Mirxes Expands in Thailand With N Health Cancer-Screening Tie-Up and New At-Home Test Kits
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Mirxes Holding Company Limited ( (HK:2629) ) is now available.

Mirxes Holding Company Limited has entered into a strategic partnership with N Health, part of Thailand’s largest healthcare provider BDMS, to roll out its miRNA-based cancer screening tests, including GASTROClear and LUNGClear, across nearly 60 hospitals in Thailand, with a scalable model intended to support broader deployment in Southeast Asia. The collaboration positions Mirxes to tap into Thailand’s fast-growing health check-up market and strengthen its regional presence in early cancer detection, while N Health enhances its end-to-end healthcare offerings and integrates advanced cancer risk assessment into preventive care amid Thailand’s aging population. In parallel, Mirxes has launched two Thailand FDA-approved at-home diagnostic test kits, HELICORapid for H. pylori and FITRapid for fecal occult blood, marking the first products of their type in the Thai market and expanding the company’s reach into the consumer segment via retail and pharmacy channels; these easy-to-use, IP-protected kits are designed to complement its miRNA portfolio and reinforce its broader early cancer detection ecosystem by enabling earlier awareness and medical follow-up for gastric and colorectal disease risks.

More about Mirxes Holding Company Limited

Mirxes Holding Company Limited is a molecular diagnostics company specializing in advanced microRNA (miRNA) cancer screening technologies, including tests such as GASTROClear for gastric cancer and LUNGClear for lung cancer. The group focuses on early cancer detection and preventive healthcare solutions across Asia, targeting both clinical institutions and, increasingly, direct-to-consumer markets through at-home diagnostic products.

Average Trading Volume: 713,366

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$11.18B

For an in-depth examination of 2629 stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Yondoshi Holdings Enhances Shareholder Benefits and Adds Holding-Period Requirement
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Yondoshi Holdings, Inc. ( (JP:8008) ).

Yondoshi Holdings has resolved to revise its shareholder benefit program effective for shareholders of record on February 28, 2026, in a move designed to deepen understanding of its products and business and to promote medium- to long-term share ownership. The company will raise the benefit level for investors holding 500–999 shares to match that of the previous 1,000–2,999-share tier and consolidate this into a broader 500–2,999-share category, while introducing a requirement that all eligible shareholders must have held their shares for more than one year. Under the new structure, qualifying shareholders can choose among shareholder benefit vouchers usable at Yondoshi group stores and its official online shop, selected 4°C or Canal 4°C jewelry items, or donations to the Japan Water Forum, signaling a strategy to reward loyal investors, reinforce brand engagement, and support corporate social responsibility initiatives.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8008) stock is a Hold with a Yen1869.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Yondoshi Holdings, Inc. stock, see the JP:8008 Stock Forecast page.

More about Yondoshi Holdings, Inc.

Yondoshi Holdings Inc. is a Japan-based holding company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market, best known for its 4°C and Canal 4°C jewelry brands and related retail operations. Through its group stores and online channels, the company focuses on fashion jewelry and accessories for domestic consumers, leveraging branded vouchers and in-house products to strengthen ties with its customer and shareholder base.

Average Trading Volume: 67,647

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen38.89B

data.title: Persistence Gold Group Rebrands with New Name, Stock Short Name and Website
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Persistence Resources Group Ltd ( (HK:2489) ) is now available.

Persistence Gold Group Ltd has officially changed its English name from Persistence Resources Group Ltd and adopted a new Chinese name, following shareholder approval at an extraordinary general meeting and subsequent registration in both the Cayman Islands and Hong Kong. In line with the rebranding, the company will change its stock short name on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange to “PERSISTENCEGOLD” in English and an updated Chinese short name from 14 January 2026, while retaining its existing stock code 2489 and preserving all shareholder rights and the validity of existing share certificates; the corporate website will also migrate to a new domain aligned with the gold-focused branding, underscoring a strategic shift in market positioning without operational disruption for investors and trading counterparties.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2489) stock is a Hold with a HK$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Persistence Resources Group Ltd stock, see the HK:2489 Stock Forecast page.

More about Persistence Resources Group Ltd

Persistence Gold Group Ltd, formerly known as Persistence Resources Group Ltd, is a company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 2489. The group operates in the resources sector with a focus signalled by its rebranding around gold, targeting investors and stakeholders in the precious metals and broader resources market.

Average Trading Volume: 10,341,650

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: HK$2.69B

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Nelson Resources Ltd. ( (AU:NES) ) has issued an update.

Nelson Resources Limited has updated its previously announced proposed issue of securities, correcting an administrative oversight regarding the number of tranche 1 and tranche 2 performance rights to be issued to the vendor of the Gold Point Project. The company has clarified that it still retains the flexibility to settle the tranche 1 and tranche 2 consideration in cash instead of performance rights, which may influence the capital structure and funding mix for the Gold Point Project and provides optionality in how it compensates the project vendor.

data.title: Nelson Resources Corrects Performance Rights Terms for Nevada Gold-Silver Acquisition
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Nelson Resources Ltd. ( (AU:NES) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Nelson Resources has corrected an error in its prior announcement regarding the proposed acquisition of the Gold Point gold-silver project in Nevada, revising the number of performance rights to be issued to the vendor from 714,285,714 to a maximum of 1,094,166,666 across two tranches. The company, which retains the option to settle the tranche 1 and tranche 2 consideration in cash or shares, will now seek shareholder approval for the acquisition and the updated performance rights structure via a forthcoming notice of meeting, while confirming that all other terms of the deal remain unchanged.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NES) stock is a Hold with a A$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nelson Resources Ltd. stock, see the AU:NES Stock Forecast page.

More about Nelson Resources Ltd.

Nelson Resources Limited (ASX: NES) is an Australian-listed resources company focused on mineral exploration and project acquisition, with a current strategic emphasis on gold and silver assets, including projects in the Walker Lane District of Nevada, USA.

Current Market Cap: A$13.69M

For a thorough assessment of NES stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

AuGroup (SHENZHEN) Cross-Border Business Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2519) ) just unveiled an announcement.

AuGroup (SHENZHEN) Cross-Border Business Co., Ltd. has called an extraordinary general meeting in Shenzhen for 26 January 2026 to seek shareholder approval for an application for a consolidated credit line and its related guarantee arrangement, a move that could affect the company’s financing capacity and balance sheet structure. The meeting will be conducted by poll in line with Hong Kong listing requirements, with proxy and registration procedures set out for domestic and H-share investors, underlining the company’s efforts to formalise shareholder consent for its planned credit facilities and to comply with governance and disclosure standards expected of Hong Kong-listed PRC companies.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2519) stock is a Hold with a HK$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on AuGroup (SHENZHEN) Cross-Border Business Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:2519 Stock Forecast page.

More about AuGroup (SHENZHEN) Cross-Border Business Co., Ltd. Class H

AuGroup (SHENZHEN) Cross-Border Business Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong under stock code 2519, operating in the cross-border business sector from its base in Shenzhen, Guangdong Province. The company is governed by a board composed of executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors, reflecting a standard listed-company governance structure for PRC issuers in Hong Kong.
